subcodes.first_line: All praise be unto God, Creator of all things and Fashioner of the heavens, unto Whom belong the most excellent names and the most exalted attributes. I pray [3.5s]... ...We have invited all men to turn towards God, and have acquainted them with the Straight Path.  They [divines] rose up against Us
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله خالق الاشیاء و فاطر السماء و له الاسماء الحسنی و الصفات العلیا اصلی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
